items.prompt: Build document fragments and preserve semantics, ownership and focus during updates. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating semantic node creation and ownership; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted authoring draft. Runtime evidence does not replace independent human standards, pedagogy, accessibility, answer-oracle, and formal-exam review.

feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic authoring check failed; inspect the exact artifact, interaction state, viewport, and observable result without assuming hidden-case details.

items.starterCode: // TODO: implement the declared bounded browser behavior.

answer.referenceSolution: const list = document.querySelector("ul"); const item = document.createElement("li"); item.textContent = "Arrays"; item.dataset.skill = "arrays"; list.append(item); document.querySelector("h1").classList.add("ready");
